mainEntity.name: What if AI wrongly excludes my New York firm from lawyer recommendations?
mainEntity.text: What if AI wrongly excludes my New York firm from lawyer recommendations?

acceptedAnswer.text: Audit profiles for inconsistencies, low reviews, or missing endorsements like Super Lawyers. Update with schema FAQs and solicit client feedback to rebuild AI trust signals.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: If excluded, check Avvo/Martindale for gaps, ensure site schema targets NYC queries. AI penalizes mismatches between self-claims and third-party data. Add media mentions. Recovery: 4-8 weeks. Warn: false exclusions may signal reputational issues opponents exploit in marketing.[3][2]

name: Fix AI Exclusion for New York Law Firms
